---
title: "SQL training"
execute: 
  freeze: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "sql/*.qmd"
  type: table
  categories: true
  fields: [title, categories]
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

source(here::here("R/training_sessions.R"))

```


```{r}
cat("## SQL training schedule")
```

```{r}

KINDR::training_sessions(tr_type = c("SQL"), output_type = "DT", start_date = as.character(lubridate::today() - 1))

```

## SQL session materials
